data.title: Ashtead Group Executes Share Buyback as Part of $1.5 Billion Program
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ).

Ashtead Group plc announced the repurchase of 84,627 of its ordinary shares as part of its $1.5 billion share repurchase program. The transaction, executed on March 20, 2025, involved shares purchased at an average price of 4,391 pence, with Barclays Bank PLC acting as the broker. This buyback reduces the number of shares in circulation, potentially increasing the value of remaining shares and reflecting the company’s confidence in its financial position. The transaction impacts stakeholders by altering the shareholding structure and may influence market perceptions of the company’s stock.

More about Ashtead

Ashtead Group plc operates in the equipment rental industry, providing a range of services and products primarily focused on construction, industrial, and general tool rental markets. The company is a key player in the market, with a significant presence in both the UK and North America.

YTD Price Performance: -12.07%

Average Trading Volume: 1,149,272

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £18.96B

For a thorough assessment of AHT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: RELX plc Expands Share Buyback Program with Latest Purchase
data.description:
RELX plc ( (GB:REL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

RELX plc announced the purchase of 257,172 of its own ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange, which will be held as treasury shares. This transaction is part of a broader share buyback initiative, with the company having acquired nearly 10 million shares since January 2025. The move is likely aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure, reflecting a strategic focus on financial management and market confidence.

More about RELX plc

RELX plc is a global provider of information-based analytics and decision tools for professional and business customers across various industries. The company operates in sectors such as scientific, technical, and medical, legal, risk and business analytics, and exhibitions, offering a range of products and services that support decision-making and improve productivity.

data.title: Lion Finance Group Executives Exercise Share Options
data.description:
Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) has shared an update.

Lion Finance Group PLC has announced the exercise of nil-cost options over ordinary shares by several of its top executives, including CEO Archil Gachechiladze, Deputy CEO and CFO Sulkhan Gvalia, Deputy CEO Nutsa Gogilashvili, and Deputy CEO Zurab Kokosadze. These transactions, conducted outside of a trading venue, reflect the company’s ongoing commitment to align its leadership’s interests with those of its stakeholders, potentially enhancing confidence in its strategic direction and market positioning.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

Lion Finance Group PLC is a FTSE 250 holding company that operates through its subsidiaries, providing banking and financial services in the high-growth Georgian and Armenian markets. It operates leading universal banks, Bank of Georgia in Georgia and Ameriabank in Armenia, focusing on customer-centric services to drive business growth, sustain high profitability, and generate strong returns, while contributing positively to the communities they serve.

data.title: Sydbank Announces Key Decisions and Leadership Changes at Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Sydbank A/S ( (GB:0MGE) ) has provided an update.

At the recent Annual General Meeting, Sydbank announced the adoption of the directors’ report and the 2024 annual report, along with a dividend distribution of DKK 26.88 per share. The bank also approved a reduction in share capital and made several amendments to its Articles of Association. Notably, the Shareholders’ Committee elected new board members, including Aksel Bjørn Møller and Brian Østergaard Roed, while appointing Ellen Trane Nørby as chairman. These changes reflect Sydbank’s ongoing efforts to refine its governance structure, potentially impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder engagement.

More about Sydbank A/S

Sydbank A/S is a financial institution based in Denmark, primarily offering banking services. It focuses on providing financial solutions to both individual and corporate clients, with a strong market presence in the Danish banking sector.

YTD Price Performance: 18.63%

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT Announces March 2025 Distribution
data.description:
Dream Industrl REIT ( ($TSE:DIR.UN) ) just unveiled an update.

Dream Industrial REIT announced its March 2025 monthly distribution of 5.833 cents per Unit, payable on April 15, 2025, to unitholders of record as of March 31, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to providing secure distributions and highlights its strong financial position, supported by a high-quality portfolio and an investment-grade balance sheet.

More about Dream Industrl REIT

Dream Industrial REIT is an unincorporated, open-ended real estate investment trust that owns, manages, and operates a global portfolio of diversified industrial properties. As of December 31, 2024, it has interests in 335 industrial assets, comprising 542 buildings with approximately 71.8 million square feet of gross leasable area across key markets in Canada, Europe, and the U.S. The company’s objective is to deliver strong total returns to its unitholders through secure distributions and growth in net asset value and cash flow per unit.

data.title: Cibox Inter@ctive SA Reports February 2025 Voting Rights and Share Capital
data.description:
Cibox Inter@ctive SA ( (FR:ALCBX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cibox Inter@ctive SA released its monthly information on the total number of voting rights and shares as of February 28, 2025. The company reported a total of 290,583,765 shares making up its capital, with gross voting rights totaling 301,755,464 and net voting rights at 294,513,262. This information is crucial for stakeholders as it reflects the company’s current shareholding structure and voting power distribution, which can influence corporate governance and decision-making processes.

More about Cibox Inter@ctive SA

Founded in 1995, Cibox is a French technology company specializing in consumer electronics, particularly in the electric micro-mobility sector. The company designs, manufactures, and maintains products like scooters and electric bikes, focusing on journeys between 3 to 30 km. Cibox markets its products under the brands Scooty and yeep.me, and in 2024, it achieved a turnover of €9.8 million. Its shares are listed on Euronext Growth Paris.

data.title: Epwin Group Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Epwin Group plc ( (GB:EPWN) ) just unveiled an update.

Epwin Group Plc has executed a share repurchase, buying back 25,000 ordinary shares at a price of 88.5 pence each, as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. This move, aimed at reducing the number of shares in circulation, will result in the cancellation of these shares, leaving the company with a total of 136,523,395 shares in issue, which could potentially enhance shareholder value by increasing earnings per share.

More about Epwin Group plc

Epwin Group Plc is a leading UK-based manufacturer specializing in energy-efficient and low-maintenance building products. The company holds significant market shares in the Repair, Maintenance and Improvement (RMI), new build, and social housing sectors.

data.description:

data.title: Independence Gold Unveils Promising Drill Results at 3Ts Project
data.description:
Independence Gold ( (TSE:IGO) ) has shared an update.

Independence Gold Corp. announced significant drilling results from the Johnny and Ted-Mint Vein Systems at its 3Ts Project in British Columbia, highlighting the discovery of robust gold-silver-bearing veins. The recent drill results, particularly from the Johnny Vein System, indicate potential contributions to an upcoming resource update, with both vein systems remaining open for further exploration. The ongoing drilling program aims to expand the known high-grade zones, reinforcing the project’s growth potential and positioning Independence Gold for future resource development.

More about Independence Gold

Independence Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold and silver mineral resources. The company is engaged in projects primarily in British Columbia, Canada, with a significant focus on the 3Ts Project, which encompasses a series of mineral claims in the Nechako Plateau region.

data.title: Draganfly Appoints Former U.S. Secretary of Defense to Board
data.description:
Draganfly ( (TSE:DPRO) ) has provided an announcement.

Draganfly Inc. has announced the appointment of Christopher C. Miller, former Acting U.S. Secretary of Defense, to its Board of Directors. Miller’s extensive experience in defense and intelligence is expected to guide Draganfly’s strategic initiatives in the government, defense, and aerospace sectors, strengthening its position as a leader in North American-made drone solutions for defense, law enforcement, and public safety.

More about Draganfly

Draganfly Inc. is a global leader in drone technology, AI, and autonomous systems, providing innovative solutions for public safety, defense, agriculture, and industrial applications. With over 25 years of experience, the company is recognized for its groundbreaking contributions to the UAV industry and commitment to delivering cutting-edge, North American-made technology.
